subcodes.first_line: O thou who reliest upon God! All thy letters have been perused and their contents noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوکل علی الله جمیع مسطورات آنجناب مطالعه گردید و بر وقوعات اطلاع حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @personal instructions, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
